name: Baking Powder Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cream of tartar.
2. Cut in the shortening using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center and add milk. Stir gently to combine.
4. Turn out the dough onto a lightly floured pastry board.
5. Knead the dough 8 times, shaping it into a disk.
6. Roll out the dough with a rolling pin until it is about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut out biscuits using a cookie cutter or knife.
8. Place the biscuits on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
